The '''H-5 70 Mining Facility''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. It was home to the [[Dynath Miners]], allies of the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]].<ref name="SWG:HMF" /> During the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]], [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] targeted [[Unidentified transport class|Dynathian transports]] in the [[Masul'ivis Asteroid Belt]]. [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] dispatched by [[Laetin A'shera]] finally repelled Black Sun forces and escorted Dynathian ships safely back to the H-5 70 Mining Facility.<ref name="SWG:EtDMBTtS" />
